condition.Description: Experimental condition to which the participant belonged

Levels.4: A farm or home in the countryside

CCC.Description: How concerned are you about climate change?

actions.Description: What actions do you consider most important in addressing climate change?
actions.Units: Points on a scale, where: 1 - Collective actions (by states, institutions, corporations), 5 - Individual actions (by ordinary people)

lifestyle.Description: Compared to other people, do you consider your lifestyle ...?
lifestyle.Units: Points on a scale, where: 1 - Definitely climate-unfriendly, 5 - Definitely climate-friendly

driver.Description: Do you have a driver's license?

car.Description: How often do you use a car (e.g. as a driver or a passenger)?

Levels.0: Once a year or several times a year
Levels.1: Once a month or several times a month
Levels.2: Once a week or several times a week

politics1.Description: Do you have any political views?

politics2.Description: In politics, the terms /left/ and /right/ are used. Can you describe your political views using these terms?

politics3.Units: Points on a scale, where: 0 - Left, 10 - Right

SES.Description: Which of the descriptions below comes closest to how you feel about your household income nowadays?

Levels.2: Finding it difficult on present income
Levels.3: Finding it very difficult on present income

PCAE_i.Description: Personal and Collective Action Efficacy (Chu & Yang, 2020) - Individual efficacy

PCAE_c.Description: Personal and Collective Action Efficacy (Chu & Yang, 2020) - Collective efficacy

PCAE.Description: Personal and Collective Action Efficacy (Chu & Yang, 2020)

PD.Description: Psychological Distance to Climate Change (Valkengoed, Steg & Perlaviciute, 2021)

ICE_anger.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate anger

ICE_discontent.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate discontent

ICE_enthusiasm.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate enthusiasm

ICE_powerlessness.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate powerlessness

ICE_guilt.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate guilt

ICE_isolation.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate isolation

ICE_anxiety.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate anxiety

ICE_sorrow.Description: Inventory of Climate Emotions (Marczak et al. 2023) - Climate sorrow
